ab: na kay cicavilika wata ma ngesale ngana civilili.
’iyakay nakowa ’asaseane na sawalay na kaka acinika gilagilaw.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫gilagilaw，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is gilagilaw, he is 11 years old.

ab: ta’aese kiname ’ikay na gako sola solate.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: kaka si kake ka madalame kiname the nay.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: madalame kake lwangolwan. ta’isasadrane ka ’angese kiname ka thakada’ane mwa lwangolangoy.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: madalame kake na ba’owane na la’osay angese kiname thenay lwangolangoy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
